paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 274 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 172 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 39 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 4 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 20 days past due with 63 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **36 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 50 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 49 days past due with 49 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 11 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 20 days past due with 46 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **74 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 12 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 37 days past due with 31 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 21 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **32 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 7 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 6 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress.

300 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **260 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 96 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 60 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 46 overdue (oldest: 20d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **74 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 89 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. 7 payment tasks need Operations attention. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. 6 payment tasks need Operations attention. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 3. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 50 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 49 overdue (oldest: 49d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 3 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 63 overdue (oldest: 20d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **36 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 36 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Ginger Brown:** 31 overdue (oldest: 37d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 8 overdue (oldest: 21d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **32 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
